hero.title: Tell us what is happening with your roof.
hero.text: Share the symptoms, rough timing and property details. We will shape the next step around access, weather and urgency.

details.title: Book a roofing survey or quote.
details.text: Call, email or send your enquiry with photos and property details. We will advise the most sensible next step.

map.title: Service area map
map.text: Serving Surrey and South West London with roof repairs, new roofs, flat roofing, guttering and inspections.

cta.title: Prefer to start with photos?
cta.text: Send roof, leak or gutter photos with your postcode and Genesis Roofing & Building can advise what information is needed before a site survey.
